backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user profiles and crypto holdings with access control, providing CRUD operations and permission‑checked queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to source files, components, and tests with confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file for quick reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and OKLCH color variables defining light and dark theme palettes and component colors.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app handling authentication flow, profile setup, and rendering the portfolio dashboard panels.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Unauthenticated welcome screen with feature highlights and Internet Identity sign‑in.
frontend/src/components/auth/UserProfile: Modal prompting first‑time users to enter and save their name before accessing the app.
frontend/src/components/charts/Allocatio: SVG donut chart rendering asset allocation segments using theme chart colors.
frontend/src/components/holdings/Holding: Provides edit/delete action menu for a holding, including confirmation dialog and upsert dialog control.
Displays the holdings table with live prices and controls for adding, editing, and deleting holdings.
Modal form for adding or editing a holding with validation and mutation logic.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: App layout with header, theme toggle, logout handling, and global styling structure.
frontend/src/components/performance/Perf: Calculates and displays gain/loss metrics for holdings that have cost basis data.
Builds a portfolio allocation view using live prices and renders a donut chart with value percentages.
frontend/src/components/portfolio/Portfo: Renders portfolio summary cards using holdings and live prices, showing total value and gain/loss with loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useLivePrices.ts: Fetches and periodically refreshes asset prices with caching and fallback to last successful results on errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with backend user profile, roles, and holdings, including mutations with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/services/prices/priceApi.ts: Fetches crypto prices from CoinGecko, mapping symbols to IDs and returning a normalized price object.
frontend/src/utils/performanceMath.ts: Calculates holding- and portfolio-level performance metrics including value, gain/loss, and percentages.
frontend/src/utils/portfolioMath.ts: Provides helpers for value calculations and number formatting, including currency and percentage formatting.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL or hash params, persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing them from the hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing app purpose, features, image requirements, and state versioning.
